name: code_languages_graph
description: Generates and returns a graph figure displaying code language statistics based on selected repositories and view type.

view.description: Selected graph view type representing how the data should be displayed.

name: package_version_graph
description: Visualizes for each packaged dependancy, if it is up to date and if not if it is less than 6 months out, between 6 months and a year, or greater than a year.

name: ossf_scorecard
description: Visualizes for each packaged dependancy, if it is up to date and if not if it is less than 6 months out, between 6 months and a year, or greater than a year.

name: repo_general_info
description: Returns general information about the repository, including the number of files, lines of code, and other relevant metrics.
